name: Ha
description: Ha was an ancient Egyptian deity primarily associated with the Western Desert and the oases located within it. He was considered a god of the desert, responsible for protecting and providing for those who traversed its harsh landscapes. Ha's role was crucial in safeguarding trade routes and ensuring the survival of travelers and settlers in the western regions of Egypt. Although not as prominent as other major Egyptian deities, Ha held significant importance in the lives of those who depended on the desert for their livelihood and security. He was often depicted as a muscular man wearing a desert dweller's garb and carrying desert weapons, symbolizing his strength and ability to overcome the challenges of the desert environment. He provided sustenance and protection to those who needed it, making him a vital figure in the religious beliefs of the people who lived in and around the Western Desert. He was also seen as a protector against the dangers of the desert, such as sandstorms and wild animals. He was sometimes associated with the god Seth, who also had connections to the desert, although Ha's role was more focused on protection and provision than on chaos and destruction. Ha's worship was particularly prevalent in the Western Desert oases, and he was often invoked in prayers for safe journeys and abundant resources. He embodies the power and resilience needed to thrive in the face of adversity.
subtitle: God of the Western Desert Oases

keyMyths.title: Ha Protects a Caravan
keyMyths.description: A caravan lost in the desert prays to Ha for guidance. He guides them to an oasis, saving them from certain death.

keyMyths.title: Ha Defeats a Sandstorm
keyMyths.description: A massive sandstorm threatens a desert settlement. Ha battles the storm, calming it and protecting the people.

keyMyths.title: Ha Provides Water
keyMyths.description: A traveler is dying of thirst in the desert. Ha reveals a hidden spring, saving their life.

sources.author: Wilkinson, Richard H.
sources.work: The Complete Gods and Goddesses of Ancient Egypt
sources.description: A comprehensive overview of Egyptian deities.
sources.text: A comprehensive overview of Egyptian deities.
